name: doctor --check vuln-scan warns (exit 0) rather than blocking on a medium-severity finding
command:
printf '{"dependencies":{"left-pad":"1.2.0"}}' > package.json && printf '%s' '- component: left-pad
  affected: 1.2.0
  severity: medium
  fixed_in: 1.3.0
  advisory_id: GHSA-y
  source: osv
' > adv.yaml && ADVISORIES=adv.yaml bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --check vuln-scan --root . 2>e.txt; ec=$?; [ "$ec" -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'doctor check=vuln-scan exit=0' e.txt && echo x10-medium-warns 1>&2
